candidate_definition_hints.text: This plugin adds a `data-tag-name` attribute to all top-level preview `div`s, allowing contextual typography. Note: this plugin does not add any styles, but enables contextual styling.

candidate_glosses.text: This plugin adds a `data-tag-name` attribute to all top-level preview `div`s, allowing contextual typography. Note: this plugin does not add any styles, but enables contextual styling.
